audit_items.proof_trace: Property fails because 7 of 8 callers (dot.c, info.c, svg.c, dps.c) pass GetBlobFileHandle() return value directly to external functions without NULL checking. GetBlobFileHandle() returns image->blob->file_info.file which is initialized to NULL and can remain NULL after failed file operations or stream switching.
audit_items.attack_scenario: External attacker triggers file format decoder (DOT, INFO, SVG, DPS) with malformed input causing file operation failure, leaving file_info.file as NULL, leading to NULL pointer dereference when passed to agread(), IdentifyImage(), at_splines_write(), or XDP functions.
